g.text: without iso: manual wrap and unwrap at every use site
with iso: conversion is a first-class optic
Every call site knows the newtype internals. Conversion is not composable.

g.title: The Iso is a value. Composing _email . each gives a Traversal over each character.
The Iso is a value. Composing _email . each gives a Traversal over each character.
